overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player crosses a street at the 'Brookland' intersection and proceeds through wet sidewalks and narrow alleys illuminated by holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with illuminated crosswalk

events.description: futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right
player steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street corner then crossing the illuminated yellow crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection
car with bright headlights approaching from the left

entered.detail: illuminated blue street sign reading 'Brookland' mounted on a metal pole
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes and red painted borders
tall modern building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade
large glowing pink advertisement display on building facade
tall palm tree in circular concrete planter

segments.scene_description: Standing at a futuristic urban intersection marked by a 'Brookland' street sign, the player waits as futuristic cars pass by before stepping onto a broad yellow crosswalk. The scene is dominated by a tall glass office tower across the street and pink holographic advertisements on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements

events.description: moving from street crossing to sidewalk walking
passing from bright holographic advertisement into slightly darker street section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and large holographic displays

entered.detail: giant illuminated vertical display showing a woman's face with a beverage can
shops with bright neon signage and glowing windows
large circular concrete planter with palm tree

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player walks along a wet concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights. A massive holographic advertisement showing a face dominates the right side initially, while futuristic storefronts with glowing signs line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and large neon signage

events.description: turning left to follow the street direction and pedestrian flow
approaching the entrance to a narrow alley between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete benches where people are seated, then turning left to follow other pedestrians toward a large red neon sign

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench facing the street
pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: modern concrete seating blocks with people resting
massive wall-mounted sign with glowing red Chinese characters
red and white striped construction barrier
dark opening between buildings leading to a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more open plaza area with concrete benches where NPCs are seated, then turns left following other pedestrians. A massive red neon sign with Asian characters becomes prominent on the left building as the player approaches a narrow alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with overhead neon signs

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between tall buildings
deeper into the alley with dimmer ambient light and concentrated neon reflections

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow dark alleyway between towering buildings, passing vending machines and trash bins

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall of adjacent building creating a canyon effect
tall dark concrete wall with occasional doors and vents
glowing pink and blue signs suspended between buildings overhead
illuminated vending machine with glowing display
stacked red containers and debris against the wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow enclosed alleyway, the player walks between towering dark buildings with neon signs glowing overhead. The space is tight and dimly lit, with vending machines and trash bins lining the walls, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, bustling urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit alleyway. It begins at the Brookland intersection, where the camera waits for futuristic traffic before crossing a broad yellow crosswalk toward a towering glass office building and pink holographic displays. As the player reaches the other side, the perspective shifts to a wet concrete sidewalk that reflects the glow of futuristic storefronts and a massive holographic face. The scene then opens into a plaza with concrete benches and pedestrians before turning left toward a prominent red neon sign with Asian characters. Finally, the environment tightens as the camera enters a narrow, dimly lit alleyway enclosed by towering dark buildings and lined with vending machines and trash bins.
